notableEvents.label: Keibert Ruiz GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Keibert Ruiz grounds into a double play, shortstop Otto Lopez to second baseman Xavier Edwards to first baseman Christopher Morel. Joey Wiemer to 3rd. Nasim Nuñez out at 2nd. Keibert Ruiz out at 1st.
